_meta.resume_note: First-pass extraction is complete for West Los Angeles College's Biology AS-T using the official 2025-2026 catalog cohort and official Biology program page. No general local Biology AS or AA is listed.

degrees.degree_title_seen: Associate in Science in Biology for Transfer
degrees.tmc_version_basis: The award requires calculus and a two-course physics sequence, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Listed as West Los Angeles College's general Biology transfer degree for the 2025-2026 cohort; no inactive or teach-out language is displayed.

major_groups.label_seen: CSU-transferable electives as needed to reach 60 units

degrees.notes: The official Biology program page provides the complete seven-course, 35-unit major and the Cal-GETC degree rule. The official catalog PDF is retained at https://www.wlac.edu/sites/wlac.edu/files/2024-08/catalog.pdf for human cohort verification; the college site blocks automated retrieval of that PDF but exposes the same degree requirements on the program page.

notes: No broad local Biology or Biological Sciences AS/AA appears in the official Biology program listing. The separately named Biology — Health Science Option is specialized and intentionally excluded.
